description: Teleoperate the follower arm using the leader arm

parameters.--robot-type: SO100 | SO101 | Koch | bimanual_SO100 | bimanual_SO101 | RealMan
parameters.--leader-arms: Leader arm ID from calibration config (e.g. leader_arm_1 or main_leader)
parameters.--follower-arms: Follower arm ID from calibration config (e.g. follower_arm_1 or main_follower)
parameters.--cameras: Optional: camera IDs and angles (omit flag entirely if no cameras needed)
parameters.--yes / -y: Auto-apply saved settings when available (skip saved-settings prompt)

port_detection: Serial ports for leader and follower are auto-detected interactively by the tool — never ask the user for port paths.
explanation: You move the leader arm by hand; the follower copies motions in real time. Used for demos, data collection, and testing before autonomous policies run. Bimanual: move both leaders to control both followers.
expected_output: Teleop running — follower mirrors leader movement

validation.rule: Follower arm physically moves when leader is moved

common_errors: Connection error — tool auto-detects new ports and retries once automatically
failed to sync — check power voltages (12V follower, 5V leader on SO arms)
failed to read motor ids — run scan/diagnose; check cable integrity
Wrong leader/follower arm ID — check available IDs in ~/.solo/ config files
notes: Camera config is optional — teleop works without cameras
Use -y to skip saved-settings prompt if settings were previously saved
